svg.title: openai-compatible-chat architecture
svg.desc: Two-zone structural diagram. Left zone: Rust chat binary with entry point, CLI mode, Web mode, shared modules, web module, and async runtime. Right zone: WASM frontend crate with entry, App component, stream_chat, and reactive state. HTTP/SSE bidirectional arrow connects the two zones. External OpenAI API sits below the Rust zone, Browser below the WASM zone.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the serializing data to filesystem: serde and serde_json')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the entry point: main.rs, clap args and mode dispatch')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the CLI mode and its TUI crates: dialoguer, termimad, crossterm')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Web server mode and how Axum and tower-http are used')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the shared modules: config, models and chat, and how both modes use them')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the web module: AppState, router, and the three API handlers')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the foundational crates shared by all modules: async-openai, tokio, serde, regex')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the static content : wasm, html, css, svg')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the WASM entry point: wasm-bindgen, mount_to_body, and panic hook setup')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Leptos App component, signals, and pulldown-cmark markdown rendering')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about stream_chat: how gloo-net and web-sys implement the POST+ReadableStream SSE pattern')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about sessionStorage and cookies: web-sys implement the persisting of application data')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about reactive state, cookie helpers, and send_wrapper usage in the frontend')
sendPrompt('How does the backend stream responses from the OpenAI-compatible API using async-openai and SSE?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser load the WASM binary and what happens at startup?')
